episodes.title: Rep. Robert Garcia gives update on Epstein files investigation
episodes.description: Congressman Robert Garcia gave an update on the ongoing Jeffrey Epstein investigation and announce federal funding for local projects. Garcia, the top Democrat on the House Oversight Committee, said the investigation is moving forward with plans to obtain additional records about Epstein that have not yet been shared with Congress or the public.

episodes.title: Bill Clinton testimony on Epstein: "I did nothing wrong"
episodes.description:
Bill Clinton told members of Congress that he “did nothing wrong” in his relationship with Jeffrey Epstein and saw no signs of Epstein’s sexual abuse.

episodes.title: Pam Bondi hearing: AG questioned over Epstein files
episodes.description:
Attorney General Pam Bondi took heated questions from lawmakers during a hearing over the Justice Department’s handling of files related to Jeffrey Epstein.

episodes.title: Feds raid LA home tied to 'TikTok cult' from Netflix documentary
episodes.description:
Federal agents raided a home in Tujunga linked to Shekinah Church, an alleged cult featured in the Netflix documentary "Dancing for the Devil." The raid is related to investigations for sex trafficking and several other crimes.
